title: Claude Code for CI/CD
description: Integrate Claude Code into a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline. On every PR, Claude must: (1) review code for security vulnerabilities, (2) check that new code has corresponding tests, (3) validate that Terraform changes follow naming conventions. The pipeline is fully automated — no human interaction during CI runs. Results must be structured so the pipeline can parse them and post comments to the PR.
architecture_notes: Use Claude Code in headless mode with the -p flag for all CI/CD steps. Each step is a separate claude -p invocation with a specific prompt. Output is captured and parsed by the pipeline. Use scoped rule files (.claude/rules/) with path globs to apply security-specific rules for src/ and terraform-specific rules for infra/. Configure permissions in .claude/settings.json to read-only mode in CI (no writes, no execution) to prevent accidental side effects. Use structured JSON output (tool_use with forced tool_choice) so the pipeline can reliably parse results without regex hacks.
key_patterns: structured JSON output for pipeline parsing
tool_choice forced for reliable structured output
